title: OpenAI, Anthropic new AI spending reality as users shift to efficiency
abstract: Is the world of AI tools a bit chaotic lately? Not the weather, silly! OpenAI and Anthropic have launched something that's really making users focus on efficiency. Picture this: those once-fancy features are now your trusty sidekicks, helping you breeze through tasks with magical ease. Dive in and see for yourself!
abstract_zh: 你是不是也觉得，AI 工具界最近有点乱？不是在说天气哦！OpenAI 和 Anthropic 新推出的这款 AI 实力惊人，直接把用户拉回现实——大家开始追求效率而不是盲目追新。想象一下吧，以前那些花哨的功能现在变成了你的得力助手，帮你高效完成任务，就像魔法一样！赶紧来体验吧！
